name: Our American Revival
subject: Do you have 5 minutes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzODcyMTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwNTg3MzAxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwNTc4Mzg1S0&rt=0) Peter,

Thanks again for signing our petition. It is your support that makes bringing real change to America possible.

As a strong supporter, we want to get your thoughts on the top issues facing America. This quick survey will only take 5 minutes of your time and will mean a great deal to us. [**TAKE THE SURVEY >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIzODcyMTkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQwNTg3MzAxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwNTc4Mzg1S0&rt=0) Thanks again for all of your support. Together we can revive America.

Sincerely,

Our American Revival

name: Ted Cruz
subject: A New Book Every American Needs To Read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
Dear Friend,

I’m writing to you about an eye-opening book <http://www.amazon.com/Our-Lost-Constitution-Subversion-Americas/dp/159184777X/ref=tmm_hrd_title_0?ie=UTF8&qid=1427729782&sr=8-1> recently written by my good friend and fellow conservative, Senator Mike Lee. It’s called Our Lost Constitution <http://www.amazon.com/Our-Lost-Constitution-Subversion-Americas/dp/159184777X/ref=tmm_hrd_title_0?ie=UTF8&qid=1427729782&sr=8-1>, and it tells the dramatic stories behind the rise and fall of crucial constitutional provisions that the D.C. establishment routinely ignores.

Like you and me, Mike recognizes the complete ignorance and disregard for our Constitution that permeates our government—in every branch, and on both sides of the aisle. I try every day to change that by battling against unconstitutional policies like Obamacare and the President’s abuse of executive power. Now, with Our Lost Constitution <http://www.amazon.com/Our-Lost-Constitution-Subversion-Americas/dp/159184777X/ref=tmm_hrd_title_0?ie=UTF8&qid=1427729782&sr=8-1>, you and I will have a powerful and fascinating tool to use in our fight to change how our nation thinks about the Constitution.

I urge you to pick up a copy <http://www.amazon.com/Our-Lost-Constitution-Subversion-Americas/dp/159184777X/ref=tmm_hrd_title_0?ie=UTF8&qid=1427729782&sr=8-1>, read it, and pass it along to any concerned citizen—conservative, liberal, or libertarian—anyone open to learning more about the heroes who inspired and wrote our Constitution, as well as the villains of history who have defied and ignored so many parts of it.

Our Lost Constitution is available from both Amazon: http://amzn.to/1BEjOIx <http://www.amazon.com/Our-Lost-Constitution-Subversion-Americas/dp/159184777X/ref=tmm_hrd_title_0?ie=UTF8&qid=1427729782&sr=8-1> and Barnes & Noble: http://bit.ly/LostConstitution <http://bit.ly/LostConstitution>.

For Liberty,
Ted Cruz
Paid for by Cruz for President

www.tedcruz.org
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonuKTKZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4AScJkI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.
